objective: OpenSSL fips.so was built without the 'v' extension (compiled as rv64gc scalar-only), leaving SG2044's RVV 1.0 vector hardware completely unused. The linux64-riscv64 target in Configurations/10-main.conf does not set -march=rv64gcv.

changes.rationale: OpenSSL fips.so was built without the 'v' extension (compiled as rv64gc scalar-only), leaving SG2044's RVV 1.0 vector hardware completely unused. The linux64-riscv64 target in Configurations/10-main.conf does not set -march=rv64gcv.
instructions: 做出最小的、保持行为不变的性能修复，以解决 RootCauseBlueprint 指出的根因。
避免无关重构和格式噪音。

expectedDiffSummary: 候选补丁应通过聚焦修改 Configurations/10-main.conf 来解决 blueprint diag-20250609-001。
